meaning: adj.无足迹的,无路的,不在轨道上行驶的
examples: Ships are wrecked in the trackless water.
The advantages and application limitations of trackless equipment are described.
The operation cost of small scale trackless equipment in a mining test is described.
The various battlegrounds have no clear borders in the trackless jungle.
This poverty and oppression drives thousands of Saharans every year to risk their lives in the trackless desert, hoping to find a better life in another country.
